home_meta_description: Korelabs builds professional, modern and secure Windows software. Download Optimus, Coto and Dicto: optimization, conversion and transcription 100% local. Free, no servers.
hero_sub: Korelabs builds desktop tools that replace what you pay for today: optimization, file conversion, transcription and more. Everything runs on your PC — no data uploaded to servers.
products_lead: Desktop tools that replace subscription services. Everything runs on your PC: no account, no cloud, no tricks.
guides_lead: Practical tutorials on RAM, PDF, transcription and privacy — without paid services.
blog_meta_title: Blog — Articles on Windows, privacy and local software | Korelabs
blog_meta_description: Articles and tutorials on freeing RAM, offline PDF conversion, Whisper transcription and Windows optimization. By the Korelabs team.
blog_index_lead: Articles on optimization, privacy and local tools for Windows. No subscriptions, no cloud.
blog_teaser_lead: Practical tutorials on RAM, PDF, transcription and privacy.

principles.title: Real performance
principles.text: Native, lightweight software that uses your hardware without slowing the system down.

principles.title: Security first
principles.text: Reversible actions, restore points and confirmations. We never touch what we shouldn't.

principles.title: Thoughtful design
principles.text: Clear, consistent interfaces anyone can understand at first glance.

principles.title: No tricks
principles.text: Zero bloatware, zero ads, zero hidden telemetry. Honest tools only.

about_lead: Korelabs is an independent studio focused on desktop tools that respect users: no commercial tricks, no ads, and obsession over detail.
about_text: Good software shows in the small things: how fast it opens, how clear the interface is, and the trust it inspires. That's the standard for every project we ship.
cta_text: Pick a program, install in minutes. Windows 10/11 · 64-bit.
